Mexico / Central America.note: Mexico, Guatemala, Costa Rica, Panama, etc.

Caribbean.note: Island rates tend to be higher than mainland Central America

South America.note: Brazil, Argentina, Colombia, Peru, Chile, etc.

Western Europe.note: UK, France, Germany, Italy, Spain, Scandinavia, etc.

Eastern Europe.note: Poland, Czech Republic, Hungary, Romania, Balkans, etc.

Middle East.note: UAE, Turkey, Egypt, Saudi Arabia, Jordan, etc.

Africa.note: Wide variation; estimate based on major tourism hubs

South Asia.note: India, Sri Lanka, Bangladesh, Nepal — self-drive uncommon; estimate may include driver

Southeast Asia.note: Thailand, Vietnam, Indonesia, Philippines, Malaysia, etc.

East Asia.note: Japan, South Korea, China, Hong Kong, Taiwan

Other.note: Fallback rate for regions not listed above
